seo.title: Structure Design, Drawing & Structural Stability Audit
seo.description: RECPL offers expert structural design and drawing services along with comprehensive structural stability audits for industrial plants, factories, and civil infrastructure across India.

hero.title: Engineering Consultancy Services
hero.summary: Structure Design. Structural Stability. Engineering Assurance.
hero.description: RECPL delivers specialised consultancy for engineering design, structural strength validation, detailed drawings, and residual life assessment of industrial and civil assets.

backgroundImage.alt: Industrial steel plant and engineering consultancy site environment

intro.title: Specialised Engineering Solutions for Industrial Safety & Compliance
paragraphs: At Radiant Engineering Consultancy Pvt. Ltd. (RECPL), our consultancy division provides specialised engineering solutions for industries that demand precision, safety, and regulatory compliance.

Our team of structural engineers and Ph.D.-level researchers uses advanced analytical tools, finite element analysis (FEA), and industry codes to deliver reliable and cost-effective design and audit solutions.

From structure design and detailed engineering drawings to structural stability audits and residual life assessment, each assignment is grounded in practical site understanding and code-compliant engineering judgement.

image.alt: RECPL engineers preparing structural design drawings and analysis

detailSections.title: Structure Design & Engineering Drawings

image.alt: Structural design and CAD modelling for industrial assets

paragraphs: Our structural design and drawing services cover the complete lifecycle of industrial and civil structures — from concept and preliminary design to detailed engineering drawings and design validation.
We specialise in designing steel structures, RCC structures, foundations, conveyor systems, crane railings, solar mounting structures, silencer derricks, and more.

Our design process integrates AutoCAD, CATIA, ANSYS, and STAAD.Pro to produce accurate, code-compliant, and buildable designs. Every design undergoes rigorous strength assessment, load analysis, and stability checks before final drawings are issued.

detailSections.title: Structural Stability Audit & Residual Life Assessment

image.alt: Engineers carrying out structural stability audit of industrial infrastructure

paragraphs: A structural stability audit is a comprehensive evaluation of the health, integrity, and load-bearing capacity of existing structures. RECPL conducts audits for factories, industrial plants, boiler houses, warehouses, bridges, and civil infrastructure to determine whether assets are safe for continued operation, require retrofitting, or have reached the end of serviceable life.
Our audit methodology combines visual inspection, non-destructive testing, material sampling, structural analysis, and code-based assessment to build an accurate picture of structural condition.
Every audit concludes with detailed reports covering findings, risk categorisation, compliance references, and actionable recommendations for repair, strengthening, monitoring, or retrofit.

detailSections.title: Third Party Inspection (TPI) of Lifting Tools, Tackles & Pressure Vessels

image.alt: RECPL team carrying out third party inspection and statutory verification of industrial equipment

paragraphs: Third Party Inspection (TPI) is a statutory requirement under the Factory Act 1948 to ensure that lifting equipment, pressure vessels, and factory machinery are safe for operation. RECPL operates as a Competent Person under Sections 28, 29, 31 & Rule 3A of the Factory Act 1948, authorised to inspect, test, and certify the fitness of industrial equipment.

Our TPI scope covers lifting tools and tackles, pressure vessels, boilers, and related accessories at prescribed intervals mandated by statute and industry practice. Reports issued by RECPL are structured for acceptance by State Factory Inspectorates and Boiler Inspectorates across India.

Every assignment is executed through pre-inspection review, on-site visual examination, required NDT support, functional testing, documentation, and clear recommendations where repair, replacement, derating, or further monitoring is necessary.
detailSections.scopeLabel: Inspection scope covered under third party inspection

capabilities.label: Overhead travelling cranes (EOT cranes), jib cranes, gantry cranes, and monorail hoists
Chain pulley blocks, lever hoists, lifting beams, spreader bars, clamps, grabs, and magnetic lifters
Wire ropes, chain slings, shackles, lifting hooks, and eye bolts
Hydraulic and mechanical jacks, fork lifts, and pallet trucks
Air receivers, compressed air tanks, autoclaves, and reactor vessels
Pressurised storage tanks, gas storage vessels, and hydraulic accumulators
Heat exchangers, condensers, and associated pressure-retaining accessories
Boiler-related statutory inspection planning and safety accessory verification

process.title: How RECPL Executes Inspection & Certification
process.description: A structured inspection workflow that combines statutory review, field checks, testing, certification, and practical recommendations.

steps.title: Pre-Inspection Planning
steps.description: Review equipment history, previous inspection reports, manufacturer specifications, and applicable codes and standards before site work begins.

steps.title: Visual Inspection
steps.description: Detailed examination for wear, corrosion, deformation, leaks, misuse, and mechanical damage.

steps.title: NDT Examination
steps.description: Non-destructive testing such as UT, MPI, and DPT is carried out wherever required to detect internal or surface defects.

steps.title: Functional Testing
steps.description: Load testing, hydrostatic or pneumatic pressure testing, and operational checks are performed as applicable to the equipment category.

steps.title: Documentation & Certification
steps.description: Issue detailed inspection reports, test certificates, and statutory fitness documentation such as Form 8, Form 10, or Form 14 where applicable.

steps.title: Recommendations
steps.description: Provide actionable recommendations for repairs, replacements, derating, or other controls if safe operation cannot be confirmed as-is.

standards.title: Compliance Framework for TPI
standards.description: RECPL third party inspection follows the statutory and technical references applicable to lifting equipment, pressure systems, and boiler-linked assets.

items.description: Sections 28, 29, 31 & Rule 3A governing inspection by a Competent Person.
Indian Boiler Regulations relevant to boilers and associated systems.
Code of practice relevant to lifting appliances and periodic examination.
Code of practice for unfired pressure vessels and safe operation checks.
Design, manufacture, erection, and testing references for cranes and hoists.
Boiler and Pressure Vessel Code references where industrial equipment requires it.
Personnel qualification basis for NDT support used during inspection.
